title: 2026 Oscar Cinematography Predictions - IndieWire
text: According to IndieWire's predictions, the cinematography category features these contenders in order of likelihood to win: One Battle After Another (Michael Bauman) as frontrunner, Sinners (Autumn Durald Arkapaw), Train Dreams (Adolpho Veloso), Frankenstein (Dan Laustsen), and Marty Supreme (Darius Khondji). The analysis notes that cinematographer Michael Bauman's victory at the ASC Awards for One Battle After Another significantly strengthened that film's position. Awards editor Sarah Shachat observed that the more painterly Train Dreams may have been overshadowed by this win, positioning the Anderson film as the clear favorite in this technical category.
